item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 9min I have to say I concur with this. I know this place has its dark elements, and the o
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 9min I have to say I concur with this. I know this place has its dark elements, and the owner is odious. But my corner has been a total delight. We've just nattered away about rattlers, old telly and snooker for nigh on two decades. I've also made many memorable friends too.
#Twitter Cita GaryOnCue @GaryOnCue · 1h I must be hugely lucky. So many people slating X, even calling it a cesspit
It’s been pretty much nothing but a joy and good to me. A fantastic, snooker curated news feed and a place I’ve made tons of friends 2 116

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 11min What it means to qualify for The Crucible for the first time
Let’s do it all again tomorrow #Ju
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 11min What it means to qualify for The Crucible for the first time
Let’s do it all again tomorrow #JudgementDay
Dobranoc! 2 18 1 mil

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 13min Some great stories already from the qualifiers and Stan Moody defying doctors' orders to
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 13min Some great stories already from the qualifiers and Stan Moody defying doctors' orders to leave hospital and book a Crucible debut is one of them.
Spoke to Stan before his first match. 'Worst I've ever felt,' he said.
Feeling a bit better now. De metro.co.uk 1 7 232

item.title: WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 28min Doctors advised Stan Moody to pull out of #JudgementDay, but there was no way he was going to miss
item.description: WST @WeAreWST · 28min Doctors advised Stan Moody to pull out of #JudgementDay, but there was no way he was going to miss his chance to reach the Crucible for the first time. 1 3 47 3 mil
